title: Kaesitius Custom pack V2
description: A minecraft custom enchant pack for lifsteal.net
body:
## we are happy to anounce that were releasing our first full release rigth bevore the start of lsn ssn 8!




<details>
<summary>Version 1.0.0 trailer</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/v2rnM-WJa5c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>













This resourcepack adds textures to the custom enchants on Lifesteal.net. The Custom Enchants all have a diffrent texture. It gives you a advantage over other players beause you can see what custom enchants they have.


<details>
<summary>Video</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XaIRKJQFCGU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


</details>


**!! you have to use the mod [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/project/jURjbCaq) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY) to make it work !!**

Note: The texturepack always needs to be in the top otherwise the armor can be glitched

if you have any issues feel free to join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/95VdgjRvm2) and ask us
